summary: This is a brief announcement post about an upcoming talk at American University. Cathy O'Neil mentions she will be speaking to math and statistics faculty and the general public about her then-in-progress book 'Weapons of Math Destruction.' The post serves primarily as a promotional notice with a link to the event poster.
key_points: O'Neil is giving a public talk at American University's math and statistics department
The talk covers the themes of her upcoming book 'Weapons of Math Destruction'
She describes the content as 'the nerdy low-down' on her book's subject matter
money_quotes: I'll be giving an evening talk to the math and statistics folks (and the general public) at American University on Weapons of Math Destruction.
So basically the nerdy low-down on what I'm writing about in my book.
key_insight: This announcement post offers a glimpse into O'Neil's early efforts to bring academic and public attention to algorithmic accountability before her book's publication.
